summary: Implemented Phase 1: Verified Replay Quickstart. Added npm run demo:verified-replay, a deterministic MCP fixture, record-mode config, a demo runner that records, packs, verifies, replays with upstream off, shows replay_miss, and catches tampering, plus docs and regression coverage.

agentTurn.user_prompt: do Phase 1: Verified Replay Quickstart till pass
agentTurn.assistant_summary: Implemented the verified replay quickstart as a runnable local product proof. The new npm run demo:verified-replay command builds the project, starts a deterministic MCP upstream through Datalox record mode, records three calls, packs and verifies a replay bundle, removes live source stores, replays the same calls from the bundle with upstream off, returns a structured replay_miss for an unseen request, and verifies that a tampered bundle fails checksum validation. Added docs, README link, roadmap status, ignored demo output, and a regression test.

tool_calls.output_summary: Demo passed. Summary: bundle_id=verified-replay-demo, tool_record_count=3, mcp_tool_catalog_count=1, replay_hit_count=3, replay_miss_count=1, upstream_calls_during_replay=0, tamper_detected=true, elapsed_ms about 3000.

tool_calls.command: PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH" npx vitest run tests/verifiedReplayQuickstart.test.ts tests/replayCanonicalDocs.test.ts tests/repoIdentity.test.ts
tool_calls.output_summary: Focused Phase 1 gates passed: 3 files, 13 tests.

file_changes.diff_summary: Added deterministic MCP fixture, record config, runnable demo script, and example README.
Documented the quickstart flow, pass criteria, output path, and product boundary.
Added verified replay demo command and docs link.
Marked Phase 1 done, added replay miss pass criterion, and listed verification commands.
Linked the verified replay quickstart doc.
Added regression coverage for record, pack, verify, upstream-off replay, replay miss, and tamper detection.
Added the quickstart doc to active replay-surface stale wording checks.

verification.command: PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH" npm run demo:verified-replay && PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH" npx vitest run tests/verifiedReplayQuickstart.test.ts tests/replayCanonicalDocs.test.ts tests/repoIdentity.test.ts && PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH" npm run check && git diff --check && PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH" npm test
verification.evidence: Demo passed with 3 tool records, 1 MCP tool catalog, 3 replay hits, 1 replay miss, 0 upstream calls during replay, and tamper_detected=true. Focused gates passed: 3 files, 13 tests. Full suite passed: 18 files, 107 tests. TypeScript and git diff checks passed.
